notes: Lists US 10,489,249; US 10,481,826; US 10,474,638 with titles and dates.

title: Git - git-pack-objects Documentation
notes: Official Git documentation on packfile creation and delta compression options.

title: Principles of Dataset Versioning: Exploring the Recreation/Storage Tradeoff (arXiv:1505.05211)
notes: Reverse-engineers Git packfile delta algorithm and base selection heuristic.

title: bsdiff - Naive Differences of Executable Code (Colin Percival)
notes: Original bsdiff algorithm description and implementation.

title: Jon Ready - The Delta Compression Algorithm Used by macOS and Google Chrome (bsdiff)
notes: Interactive explanation of bsdiff with bytewise subtraction insight.

title: xdelta man page (Debian)
notes: Official xdelta man page describing delta, patch, and info subcommands.

title: Venti - Plan 9 Archival Storage Server (man page)
notes: Venti man page describing SHA1-addressed archival storage.

title: Foundation - Fast, Inexpensive Content-Addressed Storage (MIT PDOS)
notes: Foundation paper: consumer-grade CAS with Bloom filters, inspired by Venti.

title: LBFS - A Low-Bandwidth Network File System (SOSP 2001)
notes: LBFS paper: variable-size chunking with Rabin-like rolling hash and SHA-1 indexing.

title: BorgBackup - Internals Documentation
notes: Describes repository format, Buzhash chunking, encryption, and data structures.

title: Restic - Backup to Object Storage Tutorial (DigitalOcean)
notes: Describes Restic’s content-defined chunking, Rabin fingerprinting, encryption, and repository format.

title: Duplicacy - Lock-Free Deduplication
notes: Describes lock-free dedup design and two-step fossil collection.

title: Oracle ZFS Storage Appliance - Architectural Overview
notes: Describes ZFS inline block dedup, DDT, and Hybrid Storage Pool.

title: NetApp and Oracle Settle Old Patent Litigation over ZFS (eWeek)
notes: Historical context on ZFS patent disputes.

title: Zstandard (zstd) GitHub Repository
notes: Facebook/Meta zstd compression library with dictionary training support.

title: Facebook Hit With Patent Suit Over Data Compression Tech (Bloomberg Law)
notes: Realtime Data LLC sued Facebook over Zstandard in 2018.

title: Drain: An Online Log Parsing Approach with Fixed Depth Tree (ICWS 2017)
notes: Original Drain paper: fixed-depth tree for online log template extraction.

title: Drain3 - GitHub Repository (LogPAI)
notes: Python 3 port of Drain with streaming and persistence features.

title: DeLog: An Efficient Log Compression Framework with Pattern Signature Synthesis (arXiv:2601.15084)
notes: Recent survey of log compressors; identifies parser accuracy as key bottleneck.

title: Dynamic Prime Chunking Algorithm for Data Deduplication in Cloud Storage (Korea Science)
notes: Cites Ddelta, FastCDC, and comprehensive dedup survey by Xia et al.
